reason: All FR-11 acceptance criteria are fully met. The GET /api/v1/health endpoint returns a JSON dict with exactly the four required fields: status, postgres, redis, and uptime_seconds. The status enum correctly maps to 'healthy'/'degraded'/'unhealthy' string values via HealthStatus(str, Enum). The postgres and redis fields are bool values from the injected callables. Status derivation logic is correct: both True → healthy, one True → degraded, both False → unhealthy. Tests cover all three status states plus the enum values and field types. The uptime_seconds field uses time.monotonic() for monotonic elapsed time. No regressions identified.
